raw_inputs.deck_text: Ledgerly embeds B2B payments and lending into vertical SaaS platforms. We believe the global embedded-finance market will reach $700 billion in annual revenue by 2026, up from near zero today. We have signed 3 vertical SaaS design partners and are processing roughly $60,000 in monthly payment volume in a closed beta. I spent four years as a backend engineer at a mid-size payments processor before starting Ledgerly; this is my first time as a founder. We have not yet raised outside capital and have not been through an accelerator program.
